use_cases: Displaying CRM product features in a showcase section on SaaS landing pages
Highlighting key capabilities like sales pipeline tracking and automated follow-ups
Creating visually organized feature cards for B2B software demonstrations
ai_summary: A CRM feature showcase component with a card-based layout for displaying product capabilities like sales pipeline tracking, automated follow-ups, custom reports, and team collaboration. Built with reusable card components (Card, CardHeader, CardContent, etc.) using forwardRef patterns. Clean, minimalist design suitable for SaaS product pages and CRM software demonstrations.
